calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Vacating Dismissal And Transferring Venue To Marin County
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ethan W. Chernin, Esq. (424-204-4400) for Bank of America, Defendant and opposing party / No Appearances by Plaintiff and moving party

Defendant's counsel argues that motion was received on Monday, June 24, 2013. Counsel did not follow the Local Rules on Tentative Rulings. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF KRISTI SANDFORD's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Transferring Venue To Marin County is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
